Document:
# Core Rule 5 - Don't cheat Out of game methods of communication (such as Discord) used to gain an unfair advantage are prohibited.
In-game methods such as bug abuse or exploiting are also prohibited.
If you encounter a bug while playing, please let us know about it through the community Discord or by making an issue on the Carpmosia github.
If we suspect a user to be cheating, they may be permanently banned with no chance of appeal.
